description_long: This is a stilted house with a rectangular footprint, elevated above the ground on wooden posts, typical of tropical or coastal regions. The house features a gray, metal gable roof and a wraparound wooden balcony with railings at the front, accessible by a central staircase. The exterior walls are painted a muted gray, and the house has symmetrical rows of white-framed windows on both floors. The property is surrounded by tall palm trees and smaller tropical plants, with outdoor elements such as a hammock, bicycle, and a mat visible in the yard. The main entryway is raised, with steps leading up to a covered porch area, providing shelter and a welcoming entrance.
description: A stilted, gray house with a metal gable roof, wraparound balcony, and symmetrical windows, surrounded by palm trees and tropical landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main staircase, wraparound balcony, entryway, and surrounding palm trees and outdoor items.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's elevation on stilts, the side windows, and a large palm tree directly behind the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical arrangement of windows and the stilted structure, with palm trees on either side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the stilted supports, side windows, and a palm tree partially obscuring the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central staircase leading to a covered porch with wooden railings and a prominent entry door
